notes: vmaf_tiny_v4 — canonical-6 + StandardScaler + mlp_large (3073 params), 90 epochs Adam @ lr=1e-3, MSE. Scaler (mean, std) baked into the ONNX graph as Constant nodes so the runtime feeds raw feature values. Same recipe as vmaf_tiny_v2/v3 but with ~3.5x hidden capacity over v3 (6 → 64 → 32 → 16 → 1). Dynamic-PTQ int8 sidecar via ai/scripts/ptq_dynamic.py (ADR-0275); measured drop=0.000145 vs 0.01 budget on Netflix features.
